$comment: Psychage Web Design Tokens. Generated Phase 4.A Slice 2 from psychage-v2 @ c3f2c06. Citation convention: every group includes a _source map keyed by the same leaf names; paths are relative to /Users/raiyanabdullah/Desktop/psychage-v2/. Light/Dark colors per Option B (paired values). No invented values. No clarity-score sub-app values. No default-Tailwind-only values. Dead tokens excluded per audit §4.1.

text._note: text.tertiary.light is Stone-500 darkened to 5.2:1 WCAG AA contrast on background.light per src/styles/tokens.css:71. Slice 4 must not lighten without re-checking AA.

crisis._note: Non-themed (single value). Used 41× across code per audit §4.1. Crisis surfaces must visually announce regardless of mode.

relevance._note: Non-themed. Symptom-Navigator relevance shading. high == primary.light brand teal.

teal._note: Sparse brand teal scale (no 200/300/800). Hardcoded — does not theme with mode. teal.600 == primary.default.light. teal.500 == primary.light.light.

charcoal._note: Hardcoded neutral scale (does not theme). Coexists with color.text.* per §7 Q7 resolution — charcoal handles non-text neutrals (surfaces, borders, dividers) that do not flip with mode; color.text.* handles themed text. Both stay; not subject to Slice 4 consolidation.

mood._scope: mood-feature-only — not for general use. Promoted to token per §7 Q10 resolution. Existing consumers: src/components/dashboard/QuickMoodCheckIn.tsx:12-18 (defines MOOD_OPTIONS with bgLight+bgDark alpha classes), src/components/onboarding/FirstMoodStep.tsx:10-16 (local MOOD_OPTIONS, light-only). Slice 4 dedupes both into a shared feature module consuming color.mood.*.
mood._dark_origin: Source defines no separate dark hex — same base hex used in both modes; only surface alpha varies in usage (bg-[#HEX]/10 light vs dark:bg-[#HEX]/15 in QuickMoodCheckIn.tsx). Paired L/D encoded with identical hex to honor Option B schema convention; alpha-shift behavior remains at consumer site.
mood._note: 5-step ordinal mood palette. Labels (consumer-side, not token): 1=Awful, 2=Low, 3=Okay, 4=Good, 5=Great. mood.4 (#1A9B8C) intentionally equals primary.default.light (brand teal). mood.5 (#15B8A6) is historically close to but not equal to teal.500 (#20B8A6); accepted as canonical here per Q10 (no value change from source).

_excluded._note: Dead tokens excluded per audit §4.1: urgent.amber (tailwind.config.js:69-71), watch.blue (tailwind.config.js:72-74), safe.green (tailwind.config.js:75-77), --color-background-warm (tokens.css:98), --color-primary-bg (tokens.css:99). Drift artifacts excluded: 'Wrong-teal' rgba(13,148,136,*) (=Tailwind default #0D9488, mislabeled as primary at globals.css:63-65) — Slice 4 input.

family._note: Drop-cap-only Georgia serif at src/styles/article-prose.css:67 is article-context, not a global family. Excluded.

_omitted._note: size/weight/leading/tracking omitted — psychage-v2 has no Tailwind extension for these (tailwind.config.js has no fontSize/fontWeight/lineHeight/letterSpacing customizations outside the dead fluid-3xl/4xl/5xl). The fluid-* scale (tailwind.config.js:132-136) is excluded per audit §4.1 (zero live references). Article prose has hardcoded sizes/weights in src/styles/article-prose.css:7-50; these are context-bound and document themselves rather than tokens.

spacing._note: psychage-extended steps only (tailwind.config.js:89-98). Steps 5/7/9/10/11/14/20/24/32/64 still resolve to Tailwind defaults at runtime but are not psychage tokens. Values match Tailwind defaults — extension is currently structural (var indirection), not value-divergent.

_canonical._note: Surface (card) radius resolves to xl (1rem) per audit §5 Q12 — rounded-xl 523 file uses beats rounded-lg 431 by ~17.6%, just outside 15% surfacing threshold. Card.tsx (src/components/ui/Card.tsx:25) already uses rounded-xl. Low-confidence flag — Ryan PR review.

shadow._note: shadow.glow uses rgba(26,155,140,*) = brand teal #1A9B8C (correct). Drift teal rgba(13,148,136,*) does not appear here.

duration._note: Canonical motion source = src/lib/animations.ts (per Slice 2 lock). JS literals stored in seconds (Framer Motion convention). Equivalent CSS-var system at src/styles/tokens.css:36-41 (--duration-*) and Tailwind aliases at tailwind.config.js:112-116 are DEAD (zero references in components) and excluded.

easing._note: Cubic-bezier control points as 4-element arrays (Framer Motion native form). spring is the Spark moment; use sparingly.

_constraint._note: All motion respects prefers-reduced-motion. Global override at src/styles/tokens.css:167-174 caps animation/transition-duration to 0.01ms and animation-iteration-count to 1.

maxWidth._note: wide = 100rem per tailwind.config.js. PageLayout (src/components/layout/PageLayout.tsx:11) defines a local 'wide' keyword that maps to max-w-7xl (80rem); that mapping is component-local and is NOT a token. Naming collision surfaced as §7 Q4.

screens._note: Only psychage-extended breakpoint. sm/md/lg/xl/2xl at tailwind.config.js:12-16 are redeclarations of Tailwind defaults — excluded.
